positive: A vibrant, minimalist, symmetrical depiction of a constellation map integrated with bioluminescent celestial flora. The main subject is a stylized, abstract forest of glowing nebulae and cosmic vines, centered on a deep indigo void. The color palette should be dominated by rich sapphire blues, ethereal teals, electric violets, and streaks of neon cyan, providing high contrast against deep black negative space. The composition must feature clean, graphic lines and organic, repeating patterns that translate well to screen printing on apparel. Focus on strong silhouettes and a visually balanced, almost Art Deco celestial feel. The lighting should be dramatic and internal, emanating softly from the flora itself. --ar 1:1 --style graphic --v 6.0
